summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDS Dashboard customization features including templates, widgets, drag-and-drop edit mode, and Metas (sales goals). All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend dashboard features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) when charts render - cosmetic issue, charts display correctly

passed_tests: Login flow with andy.escudero / secreto
Dashboard loads with widgets (stat cards, charts, stock alerts, metas widget)
GET /api/dashboard returns resumen data with products, sales, purchases
GET /api/dashboard/templates returns 4 templates (Ejecutivo, Ventas, Inventario, Analítico)
GET /api/dashboard/config returns layout config with template, layout, custom fields
POST /api/dashboard/config saves layout successfully
Plantillas modal opens and shows all 4 templates with descriptions and widget counts
Selecting Inventario template changes dashboard layout (verified: different stat cards, charts)
Personalizar (Edit mode) button enables drag-and-drop mode
Edit mode shows: Modo edición banner, Widget/Guardar/Cancelar buttons, red X remove buttons on widgets
Add Widget modal shows available widgets categorized (Indicadores, Gráficos, Tablas)
Save layout persists to backend via POST /api/dashboard/config
Cancel button exits edit mode without saving
GET /api/metas returns current period goals with progress calculation
POST /api/metas sets a new sales goal (admin only)
Metas widget shows progress bar, Actual, Meta, Faltan values
Admin can set sales goal through Metas widget gear icon
Metas modal shows Período and Meta de Ventas input
Sidebar navigation works for all sections: Dashboard, Estadísticas, Productos, Ventas, Compras, Clientes, Proveedores, Gastos, Reportes, Historial Stock, Usuarios, Auditoría
Logout flow works correctly - redirects to login page
Authentication required for all dashboard endpoints (401 returned without auth)
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about recharts dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts render correctly but warnings appear during initial load. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components.
seed_data_creation: Set sales goal (meta) to 100,000,000 Gs for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard customization features fully tested. Templates (Ejecutivo, Ventas, Inventario, Analítico) switch correctly. Edit mode with drag-and-drop works. Metas widget allows admin to set sales goals. All sidebar navigation working. Previous iterations tested auth, products, statistics - those remain stable.
